testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: The price filter tags were not displayed on the page. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The price filter tags were not displayed on the page. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepDefinations.FilterSteps.the_price_is_validated_successfully(FilterSteps.java:42) at ✽.the price is validated successfully(file:///C:/Users/amaan/eclipse-workspace/framework_project/src/test/resources/features/C.filter.feature:8)
